code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(l)
  l
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut sum = 0
mut tok = ""
mut stopped = false
mut i = 0

while i < n and not stopped
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    -1
  end

  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13

  if is_ws
    if not string.is_empty(tok)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        if v < 0
          stopped = true
        else
          sum = sum + v
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      tok = ""
    end
  else
    tok = "#{tok}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not stopped
  if not string.is_empty(tok)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      if v < 0
        stopped = true
      else
        sum = sum + v
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
end

println("partial=#{sum}")
